description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a mix of light-colored exterior walls and wooden fencing. The property is surrounded by four large, leafy trees and includes a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs and a small garden, while the backyard contains a covered patio area with outdoor seating. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the structure, allowing for ample natural light. The building is enclosed by a wooden fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a functional outdoor living space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with light walls, wooden fencing, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and three trees framing the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the covered patio, backyard seating area, and wooden fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, covered patio, and the full extent of the wooden fence.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the flat roof, rear garden, and the arrangement of trees around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
